steps.obligation: review the incident briefing in briefing.md
set ticket TCK-2201 to status "in-progress"
record a note under id NOTE-BI-1 confirming ownership of the incident
inspect billing-config.json and confirm the state of double_charge_guard
set double_charge_guard to true in billing-config.json
deploy billing-api at version "v3.4.1"
confirm with ops_lookup that billing-api is running v3.4.1
record a note under id NOTE-BI-2 confirming the guard fix is live
confirm the three affected orders and amounts against orders.csv
issue a refund of 19.99 to order ORD-5501
email amara.osei@fernpost.example with the subject "Your Brightloom refund has been issued"

args.subject: Your Brightloom refund has been issued

args.subject: Your Brightloom refund has been issued

steps.obligation: write refunds-summary.md listing every refund issued for this incident
set ticket TCK-2201 to status "refunds-complete"
email finance@brightloom.example with the subject "Billing incident TCK-2201: refunds summary"
set ticket TCK-2201 to status "resolved"
write incident-closure.md summarising the remediation
